name: pds
description: Teach, audit, implement, review, self-improve from feedback, and bootstrap designer-ready React apps with the PDS design system.

interface.shortDescription: Use PDS to learn, audit, build, review, or start React web apps.
interface.longDescription: Helps product designers and AI coding agents adopt PDS in React web projects: learn the plugin workflow, audit existing apps, implement product screens from briefs or Figma handoff, review generated UI against PDS, turn design feedback into durable PDS guidance improvements, and bootstrap new Vite React apps.
defaultPrompt: Teach me how to use the PDS plugin
Audit this app for PDS adoption
Learn from this design feedback and update PDS guidance
Start a new PDS React app here
